name: Diram Serethi
bio:
Physical Appearance: Dunmer (Dark Elf) male wearing belted braies, a collared shirt, and sandals. Carries a small amount of gold. Currently affected by Ancotar's invisibility experiments, rendering him unseen.
Race: Dunmer
Personality Keywords: proactive, responsible, willing
Role: Diram Serethi is a merchant and innkeeper of the Aleswell Inn in the village of Aleswell. Like the rest of the town's population, he fell victim to Ancotar's inconsiderate experiments down in Fort Caractacus. Unlike the other residents, he is the only one willing to do something about it.
Home Location Information: The Aleswell Inn, which he co-owns with his twin sisters.
Daily Routine: Diram wanders around the Inn all day and night alongside his two twin sisters and co-owners: Adosi Serethi and Urnsi Serethi.
Family Relations: Diram has two hateful twin sisters, Adosi and Urnsi, who co-own the inn with him. Their hostile attitudes contrast with his more proactive approach to the town's problems.
The Invisibility Affliction: Like the other residents of Aleswell, Diram is affected by a constant Chameleon ability caused by Ancotar's experiments in Fort Caractacus, making him invisible.
Personality - The Willing Problem-Solver: Unlike the other residents of Aleswell who have resigned themselves to their invisible state, Diram stands out as the only one willing to take action about the situation. His proactive nature sets him apart from his sisters and the rest of the afflicted townspeople.
author: Bethesda
